questions.name: DSA - Data structures: Stack and Queue Combination
questions.questiontext: We have an empty stack and an empty queue. Perform the operations: stack.push(10), stack.push(20), queue.enqueue(stack.pop()), queue.enqueue(30). What will be the value at the front of the queue after these operations?

questions.name: DSA - Sorting algorithms: Quicksort vs Bubblesort

answers.text: The Quicksort algorithm is always more efficient than the Bubble sort algorithm
There are cases where Bubble sort is more efficient than Quicksort
In the best case, Quicksort has a time complexity of O(log n)
In the best case, Bubble sort has a time complexity of O(n)
